heading: MOTOR VEHICLES USED BY NONPROFIT FOOD BANK
operative_text: The taxes imposed by this chapter do not apply to the sale, use, or rental of a motor vehicle that is: (1) purchased, used, or rented by a nonprofit food bank, as defined by Section 162.001; and (2) used primarily by the nonprofit food bank for the food bank's purposes.
_note: Text is truncated at end ('see other' — sentence incomplete). Definition of 'nonprofit food bank' is not contained in this excerpt; it is referenced to §162.001. Two enactments noted: H.B. 4226 (Ch. 651) and S.B. 2064 (Ch. 870), both Acts 2025, 89th Leg., R.S., eff. September 1, 2025.
